channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — May 14, 2026
item.description: In Beijing, a high-stakes summit unfolds between US President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping, addressing critical trade and geopolitical tensions. Across Ukraine, Russia has launched one of its most extensive drone attacks to date, cau...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 13, 2026
item.description: A significant diplomatic encounter is underway in Beijing as US President Donald Trump meets with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, marking President Trump's first visit to China since 2017. Meanwhile, Iran's use of a "mosquito fleet" continues to disrupt s...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 12, 2026
item.description: From escalating tensions between the United States and Iran, to a critical summit in China, and new sanctions from the European Union, global affairs continue to unfold with significant implications. Here in Europe, a political crisis grips the Unite...
